name: HC · Clinical — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Cardiology', 'Dr. Patel', 'Catheterization', 142, 3.2, 8, 420000),
  ('Cardiology', 'Dr. Patel', 'Bypass Surgery', 61, 7.4, 5, 890000),
  ('Cardiology', 'Dr. Chen', 'Catheterization', 118, 3.0, 6, 340000),
  ('Orthopedics', 'Dr. Nguyen', 'Knee Replacement', 98, 2.8, 4, 510000),
  ('Orthopedics', 'Dr. Nguyen', 'Hip Replacement', 74, 3.1, 3, 440000),
  ('Orthopedics', 'Dr. Lewis', 'Spinal Fusion', 55, 4.5, 7, 680000),
  ('Oncology', 'Dr. Rossi', 'Chemotherapy', 210, 1.2, 18, 920000),
  ('Oncology', 'Dr. Rossi', 'Radiation', 175, 1.0, 12, 640000),
  ('Neurology', 'Dr. Okafor', 'Stroke Care', 89, 5.1, 14, 730000),
  ('Neurology', 'Dr. Okafor', 'Epilepsy', 63, 2.3, 6, 310000),
  ('Emergency', 'Dr. Walsh', 'Trauma', 312, 1.8, 22, 1100000),
  ('Emergency', 'Dr. Walsh', 'General', 541, 0.9, 31, 870000)
) AS t(department, physician, procedure_type, patient_count, avg_los_days, readmissions, revenue)
